column19: My streaming rule: keep one light show, one intense show, and one comfort rewatch—so your mood always has a match. Use subtitles (you catch more than you think) and don’t start new series late at night unless you’re ready to sacrifice sleep. Good earphones + no scrolling = 10x better experience. And make a watchlist, or you’ll waste more time choosing than watching. 🍿
